When Szidon gets wind of her intentions, Amy wrongly points a finger at Krista, who has just given birth. As the crisis reaches its denouement, Amy is intercepted by HR, who take her to meet with Szidon and Abaddonn lawyers for a final reckoning.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: After his girlfriend Suzanne moves out because of his failure to stop drinking and smoking pot, between-books novelist Jonathan Ames peruses his favourite Raymond Chandler novel, Farewell, My Lovely, and is inspired to place an ad on Craigslist offering his services as an unlicensed private investigator. Within hours he gets his first case, involving a 19-year-old girl's desperate search for her missing sister. Despite the fact that he should be working on his second novel, and despite the fact that he is on deadline for a magazine piece, Jonathan heads out into the urban night to track down the girl, embracing his new-found noir-detective status. At the end of a very long day, Jonathan earns his fee - and finds he's got another case.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: During an unsuccessful attempt to win back Suzanne, Jonathan gets a phone call and a new case: a woman named Jennifer wants him to tail her boyfriend Gary to see if he's been unfaithful. After learning that he and Jennifer share a common pastime - drinking - Jonathan goes in search of her boyfriend, with uncomfortable results. Meanwhile, Ray brings Jonathan along to his colonic for moral support, and George hatches a knockout plan for Jonathan to help him cover up an unsightly sore before a big speech.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Missing Screenplay
programme.desc: At a New York film-society party, George introduces Jonathan to filmmaker Jim Jarmusch, a fan of Jonathan's first book, who is interested in having him rewrite a screenplay. Later, after leaving his personalised script in a therapist's office during an ill-advised late-night tryst with a very young party girl, Jonathan convinces Ray to pose as a patient in order to retrieve it. Meanwhile, George is flummoxed when he runs into his sexy ex-wife Priscilla and her arrogant new husband, fellow publishing magnate Richard Antrem.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Stolen Skateboard
programme.desc: Jonathan falls for his latest client, the mother of a boy whose skateboard was stolen by a neighbourhood bully. Meanwhile, Ray agrees to help a lesbian couple start a new family, to his wife Leah's chagrin. And George has a nostalgic 'armpit crush' on a young publicist he hopes to woo at the opening of a new Brooklyn restaurant.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lonely White Dove
programme.desc: A smitten Russian parolee contracts Jonathan to track down a chanteuse known as 'the Lonely White Dove'. After a vodka-fuelled reconnaissance mission at the Brighton Beach restaurant where the singer works, Jonathan persuades Suzanne, along with Ray and Leah, to join him there for dinner the next night, without revealing his true purpose. Meanwhile, George decides to get in touch with his feminine side as a way to drive sales of his sagging magazines.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Beautiful Blackmailer
programme.desc: Leah hires Jonathan to help find her new dog, 'Little Ray', and Ray joins him in the search, getting some help from a local woman. A reflective George heads to the hospital for surgery.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Stolen Sperm
programme.desc: Concerned over the sudden disappearance of the two lesbians who've been buying his sperm, Ray enlists Jonathan to help track the couple down. Breaking into their apartment, Jonathan learns the pair has flown the coop - but not without leaving behind a clue that both shocks and intrigues Ray. Meanwhile, George ignores Jonathan's warnings by publishing a disparaging editorial about Richard Antrem, sending his publishing rival into a fit of rage at a local bar.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Having picked up the gauntlet thrown down by Richard - and having thwarted a blackmail bid aimed at getting Jonathan to take a dive - the Edition team gear up for a triple-header boxing challenge against their GQ rivals. But with the bouts only hours away, the women in their lives offer some compelling reasons why winning isn't everything.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: When we last dropped in on New York writer, romantic, unlicensed private detective Jonathan Ames he was taking a pounding in the boxing ring while still licking his breakup wounds. Now that his second novel has been completed (and rejected), Jonathan is augmenting his income as a creative-writing teacher, while taking on some new, desperate clients, ranging from a kinky policeman to the publishing rival of his sexagenarian pal, George Christopher (Ted Danson). How he solves anything is a mystery. In Season 2, Jason Schwartzman returns as Jonathan, who has also decided to be a teacher in a night class in creative writing, though few of his students have any idea who he is. He also continues to hang out with (and enlist the help of) his pal, a laconic, hen-pecked cartoonist named Ray (Zach Galifianakis). This season's guests include Oliver Platt, Laila Robins, John Hodgman and Kristen Wiig, all of whom appeared in Season 1. Other guests include Jessica Hecht, F. Murray Abraham, Kristen Johnston, Mary Kay Place, Kevin Bacon, Olympia Dukakis, John Rothman, Domenick Lombardozz, Richard Masur, Allyce Beasley, Finnerty Steeves, Joel Marsh Garland (The Bounty Hunter), Zoe Kazan (It's Complicated) and Jonathan Ames himself.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Jonathan is hired by Richard Antrem, George's nemesis and boxing foe, to investigate Richard's suspicions that his wife Priscilla (George's ex) is having an affair, and Jonathan's insecurities resurface when Stella announces she's not over her first love. George learns he has a new female urologist, while Ray plots to win back Leah by penning a comic book.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: George worries about remaining 'intact' after getting some sobering news from his new urologist, Dr Kenwood, and a bad day for Jonathan gets worse when a pair of S&M henchmen kidnap him, demanding a ransom that calls 'GI' George and Ray to action.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: I've Been Living Like A Demented God!
programme.desc: A professor hires Jonathan to track down a valuable item, while George finds an alibi to explain the results of his drug test. Flushed with cash from his Super Ray comic book, Ray heads to the bar and meets a familiar barfly.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to repair the relationship between a poet/limousine driver and his wife, and Ray has a meeting with Kevin Bacon.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Grievous Clerical Error!
programme.desc: Leah hires Jonathan to help find her new dog, Little Ray. Ray joins Jonathan in the search for the dog, getting some inside help from a local woman. A reflective George heads to the hospital for surgery.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Jonathan meets a new client, a dermatologist who asks him to deliver a letter to his intended at an Asian health spa. Jonathan decides to go with George and Ray to celebrate Ray's birthday, which ends up hurting Ray's feelings. George tries to cheer Ray up in the usual manner. At his writing class, Jonathan learns that Louis Greene won a contest with a story based on Jonathan. When Nina comforts him after class, things go a bit further than Jonathan expected.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: After spending the night with Jonathan, Nina announces she wants to move in, but Ray has a crisis so Jonathan rushes over to his place before he and Nina can resolve the issue. Ray's stalker has sent him emails and a voodoo doll. Jonathan enlists the help of Officer Drake to find Ray's stalker. They convince Drake to track the stalker's emails to a specific computer. At Edition, Kathryn informs George that since he doesn't have cancer, he must be re-evaluated by their substance abuse experts. George prefers a sanitarium, but can he handle two months in Arizona?

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: After celebrating the release of his new book The Blonde in the Woods, Jonathan learns some distressing familial news. George reunites with his daughter Emily and meets her new boyfriend. Ray spends time with his biological son Spencer. Meanwhile, Jonathan's latest case leaves him in a precarious position.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: On the run, Jonathan and Ray try to hunt down the person who framed Jonathan. Meanwhile, George covers for them despite his growing cannabis-induced paranoia.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: As a guest on The New Dick Cavett Show, Jonathan runs into his nemesis. George is surprised to hear Bernard and Emily's news, and Ray sets off an AMBER Alert.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: While showing Emily a 'youthful' time, Jonathan discovers a classified ad for a detective impersonating himself. On a night out with Bernard, George learns that Richard Antrem has opened a restaurant aimed at hurting George's restaurant. Ray, in hot water with Leah, finds himself drawn to a lonely woman named Belinda.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: I Keep Taking Baths Like Lady Macbeth
programme.desc: Jonathan and George see a 'friendship' counsellor and George begins taking singing lessons from a delightful pothead named Josephine. Jonathan attempts to win back George's affection and Ray becomes irresistible to women.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: Two Large Pearls And A Bar Of Gold
programme.desc: Jonathan's college sweetheart enlists him to guard her wedding jewels and reminds him of their prenuptial pact. Ray moves in with George, and George warns Josephine about growing too attached.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Rose Hiney connects with Jonathan on some new leads. George and Ray attempt to right their unrightable wrongs.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: Nothing I Can't Handle By Running Away
programme.desc: George throws a wedding for Emily and Bernard; Jonathan is hesitant to break it off with his new lady; Ray retreats into Spencer's arms; Jonathan gets taken hostage; Ray gathers an army of his new-found Super Ray fans.

Now that his second novel has been completed (and rejected), Jonathan is augmenting his income as a creative-writing teacher, while taking on some new, desperate clients, ranging from a kinky policeman to the publishing rival of his sexagenarian pal, George Christopher (Ted Danson). How he solves anything is a mystery. In Season 2, Jason Schwartzman returns as Jonathan, who has also decided to be a teacher in a night class in creative writing, though few of his students have any idea who he is. He also continues to hang out with (and enlist the help of) his pal, a laconic, hen-pecked cartoonist named Ray (Zach Galifianakis). This season's guests include Oliver Platt, Laila Robins, John Hodgman and Kristen Wiig, all of whom appeared in Season 1. Other guests include Jessica Hecht, F. Murray Abraham, Kristen Johnston, Mary Kay Place, Kevin Bacon, Olympia Dukakis, John Rothman, Domenick Lombardozz, Richard Masur, Allyce Beasley, Finnerty Steeves, Joel Marsh Garland (The Bounty Hunter), Zoe Kazan (It's Complicated) and Jonathan Ames himself.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Jonathan is hired by Richard Antrem, George's nemesis and boxing foe, to investigate Richard's suspicions that his wife Priscilla (George's ex) is having an affair, and Jonathan's insecurities resurface when Stella announces she's not over her first love. George learns he has a new female urologist, while Ray plots to win back Leah by penning a comic book.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: George worries about remaining 'intact' after getting some sobering news from his new urologist, Dr Kenwood, and a bad day for Jonathan gets worse when a pair of S&M henchmen kidnap him, demanding a ransom that calls 'GI' George and Ray to action.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: I've Been Living Like A Demented God!
programme.desc: A professor hires Jonathan to track down a valuable item, while George finds an alibi to explain the results of his drug test. Flushed with cash from his Super Ray comic book, Ray heads to the bar and meets a familiar barfly.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to repair the relationship between a poet/limousine driver and his wife, and Ray has a meeting with Kevin Bacon.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Grievous Clerical Error!
programme.desc: Leah hires Jonathan to help find her new dog, Little Ray. Ray joins Jonathan in the search for the dog, getting some inside help from a local woman. A reflective George heads to the hospital for surgery.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Jonathan meets a new client, a dermatologist who asks him to deliver a letter to his intended at an Asian health spa. Jonathan decides to go with George and Ray to celebrate Ray's birthday, which ends up hurting Ray's feelings. George tries to cheer Ray up in the usual manner. At his writing class, Jonathan learns that Louis Greene won a contest with a story based on Jonathan. When Nina comforts him after class, things go a bit further than Jonathan expected.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: After spending the night with Jonathan, Nina announces she wants to move in, but Ray has a crisis so Jonathan rushes over to his place before he and Nina can resolve the issue. Ray's stalker has sent him emails and a voodoo doll. Jonathan enlists the help of Officer Drake to find Ray's stalker. They convince Drake to track the stalker's emails to a specific computer. At Edition, Kathryn informs George that since he doesn't have cancer, he must be re-evaluated by their substance abuse experts. George prefers a sanitarium, but can he handle two months in Arizona?

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: After celebrating the release of his new book The Blonde in the Woods, Jonathan learns some distressing familial news. George reunites with his daughter Emily and meets her new boyfriend. Ray spends time with his biological son Spencer. Meanwhile, Jonathan's latest case leaves him in a precarious position.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: On the run, Jonathan and Ray try to hunt down the person who framed Jonathan. Meanwhile, George covers for them despite his growing cannabis-induced paranoia.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: As a guest on The New Dick Cavett Show, Jonathan runs into his nemesis. George is surprised to hear Bernard and Emily's news, and Ray sets off an AMBER Alert.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: While showing Emily a 'youthful' time, Jonathan discovers a classified ad for a detective impersonating himself. On a night out with Bernard, George learns that Richard Antrem has opened a restaurant aimed at hurting George's restaurant. Ray, in hot water with Leah, finds himself drawn to a lonely woman named Belinda.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: I Keep Taking Baths Like Lady Macbeth
programme.desc: Jonathan and George see a 'friendship' counsellor and George begins taking singing lessons from a delightful pothead named Josephine. Jonathan attempts to win back George's affection and Ray becomes irresistible to women.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: Two Large Pearls And A Bar Of Gold
programme.desc: Jonathan's college sweetheart enlists him to guard her wedding jewels and reminds him of their prenuptial pact. Ray moves in with George, and George warns Josephine about growing too attached.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.desc: Rose Hiney connects with Jonathan on some new leads. George and Ray attempt to right their unrightable wrongs.

programme.title: Bored to Death
programme.sub-title: Nothing I Can't Handle By Running Away
programme.desc: George throws a wedding for Emily and Bernard; Jonathan is hesitant to break it off with his new lady; Ray retreats into Spencer's arms; Jonathan gets taken hostage; Ray gathers an army of his new-found Super Ray fans.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: Julio obtains a gold oyster earring, then promptly loses it at the club. Julio explains his sensitivity to shapes, colours, numbers and the alphabet to his fellow rideshare passengers.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: Julio fixates on finding the oyster. He starts his search with Skyler, an influencer desperate to stay relevant.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: After learning of a program that would free his mind from his body, Julio gets a lead on the lost oyster from a bartender, who takes him to the former site of the first gay hamster club.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: When Julio repeatedly refuses to participate in a credit card commercial, Vanesja finds him a new opportunity in a superhero movie. In preparation, he goes to a jump rope class.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: As Julio searches for a loophole to avoid getting a proof of existence, Vanesja contemplates her purpose after run-ins with a successful but depressed client and former professor.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: Julio half-heartedly strikes a deal to create a project for a corporation. But when Vanesja gets a surprising call about Julio's rejected work, an exciting new opportunity emerges.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Ben Epstein and his best friend Cam are destined to succeed, if only they can find the right scheme. Their venture to sell Ben's Wilfredo Gomez branded skateboard decks hasn't gone well because their star spokesperson has disappeared. Needing to get some of their money back Cam talks Ben into a leather jacket hustle, but they are busted before they can make a sale. Meanwhile, Ben's love-life goes from bad to worse when he discovers the hard way that his ex, Rachel, has moved on with a successful hotelier.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Using the money they got via yet another high-interest loan from Rene, Ben and Cam get their hands on the spool of Japanese denim. They hit a series of dead ends in their search to find a manufacturer for their brand of retro 1970s jeans, but after crashing a dinner with a designer, they are granted a meeting. Rachel invites Ben out for sushi and it ends badly when he realises it's a 'moving on' kind of date. Rene tries some grass-roots marketing ideas for his new beverage Rasta Monsta.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Ben and Cam track down a tailor to make the 1970s inspired jeans sample for 'Crisp', but discover the fee is a firm $1500. Ben goes to his father for a loan, but his pride stops him from going through with it. Rachel, who works at an interior design firm for an eccentric boss named Edie, rethinks her future after reconnecting with a friend who's back for a short visit from her Peace Corps stint in Africa. Eager to get a bigger marketing commitment for his fledgling Rasta Monsta drink, Rene makes a buyout offer his marketing partners better not refuse. Cam peddles Ben's Wilfredo skateboard decks to some rich Upper East Side kids to round up enough money to pay the pattern maker.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: It's Rachel's birthday and Edie announces she's throwing her a dinner party. When plans get crossed, Rachel invites both Darren and Ben to the party. Though Ben has convinced himself he's moved on, he can't bring himself to be the odd man out. Ben agrees to take Kappo for his long-promised night of clubbing so when Gingy alerts Cam and Domingo to her concerns that Ben is having a hard time, they realise their friend needs company.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Ben and Cam run into denim entrepreneur Pete Powell in town for business and Cam pushes Pete to hook them up with his Japanese buyer Haraki, but Ben then refuses to go to the meeting. After Darren is threatened by Ben's birthday gift of Cheez Doodles, Edie urges Rachel to prove to her new beau that she's moved on. Rachel invites Darren to have sex in the cloisters to make him feel special. Rene tracks down his cousin Tito to retrieve the bag of cash he had him stash while he was in jail. But Tito and his wife have split up and Tito says the cash is in her basement.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Kappo floats Ben and Cam another loan to cover the vintage Ts they need to buy to make their order before Haraki goes back to Japan. Darren takes Rachel to see his childhood home and then asks her to move in with him, although she has suspicions about his sexuality. Rene continues to look for Flaco to get his missing money. When they finally meet up, Flaco insists he didn't take the money.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Cam and Ben promise Rene they can get him his money in 24 hours when they deliver their T-shirts. Rene lets them work off the money by handing out Rasta Monsta drinks, but they abandon their post when they get a call to pick up the shirts. Rachel is ignoring Darren's calls so he goes to Edie directly to offer her a shot at designing his new hotel. After a presentation, they get the job, but Rachel is suspicious of the offer and tells Darren she's not ready to move in with him. Rene has to impress the beverage company's owner before he can get his Rasta Monsta buyout approved.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Cam juggles his new indentured servitude to Rene with trying to work out how to refill the T-shirt order for Haraki. When he hears Rene mention the insurance claim, Cam suspects his cousin may have had something to do with the stolen Rasta Monsta truck. Rachel has Darren and Edie meet her at the hotel and announces she's quitting the hotel gig, her job with Edie and Darren. While Rene sets up the Rasta Monsta bingo night at the church, he takes the opportunity to confess his criminal urges.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: A comedy focusing on the urban adventures of Ben an aspiring designer and Cam, Ben's best friend, free-spirit and would-be mogul, they continue to hustle to get their Crisp line of t-shirts and hoodies off the ground following a (potentially) lucrative trip to Japan via New York. Back from her soul-searching globe-trot, Rachel realises she still has feelings for Ben, but discovers he's seeing Julie, Rene puts up a head-turning Rasta Monsta billboard that incenses his girlfriend and Domingo expands his business beyond dog-walking.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Ben and Cam find themselves stuck between their new sales rep and a hard place when they have the opportunity to crash a brunch hosted by the well-connected Nancy Frankenburg. On the personal front, Cam is determined to move out of his grandmother's place, and Ben makes an indifferent step toward commitment by giving Julie his spare key. Rene leans on an indebted client to pay up, but not with money, Rachel lands a new job at Biscuit magazine, and lights up with Domingo.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Fashion rep Nancy lands Crisp a promising gig, though not for the money or clientele that Ben and Cam had hoped for. Rachel bestows a lavish gift on Ben after learning that he and Julie may be parting ways, and Cam goes into the dealing business with Domingo to help raise money for a river-view apartment. Rene shoots a Rasta Monsta viral video with Wilfredo Gomez, and gets closer to his girlfriend Debbie.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: At an upstate wedding, Ben's platonic friendship with Rachel is tested by nostalgia and a revelation about the new guy she's been seeing. Meanwhile, Kapo stresses about speaking from the heart in his best man speech. Cam charms Lulu's dad to secure the perfect location (and an unlikely model) for Crisp's new 'lookbook' photo shoot, and Rene seeks to collect on a debt to cover the costs of Rasta Monsta's expanding business (and to buy bling for Debbie).

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: After Nancy puts the kibosh on getting Crisp into a large midwestern retailer, Ben and Cam take matters into their own hands to charm its young out-of-town buyers. Rene tries to make amends with Debbie and prove he can be a stable family man and Rachel goes from feeling lost at Biscuit to alive in Bushwick, all in a single day.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Ben senses a conflict of interest when Nancy sets Crisp up with a manufacturer named Yosi. Determined to bring some spice to Biscuit, Rachel disregards her boss and pursues an edgy lead. The Feds catch up with Kapo, Lulu warns Cam against selling out and Rasta Monsta incites the ire of the East Flatbush Caribbean League.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Ben and Cam debate the future of Crisp. Rene hunts down the culprit behind the Rasta Monsta tincture spray, and gives Kapo some advice on how to survive medium security. Rachel commemorates a job setback with 'shrooms and a shvitz'.

programme.title: How to Make it in America
programme.desc: Questioning his faith in Nancy and Yosi, Ben tries to find a way to stitch CRISP - and his friendship with Cam - back together. Domingo and Cam try to clear Rasta Monsta's name with the East Flatbush Caribbean League. Rachel seeks out Edie's advice and Kapo has the best prison send-off party ever.

programme.desc: Julio obtains a gold oyster earring, then promptly loses it at the club. Julio explains his sensitivity to shapes, colours, numbers and the alphabet to his fellow rideshare passengers.

programme.desc: Julio fixates on finding the oyster. He starts his search with Skyler, an influencer desperate to stay relevant.

programme.desc: This bath and body range caters to sensitive skin with its formulated all-natural ingredients. Each element is chosen to nourish and rehydrate providing a luxurious and soothing experience.

programme.title: Elizabeth Grant Beauty
programme.desc: Transform your skincare routine with Elizabeth Grant Beauty, a trusted name since 1958. Rejuvenate even the most damaged skin and experience the transformation today.

programme.title: Charlie Bears Christmas Collectables
programme.desc: Handmade in Southern England, Charlie Bears are collectible plush bears of the highest quality. Enjoy a special segment today with perfectly sweet Christmas Collectables, sure to delight enthusiasts.

programme.title: Who is Elijah Fragrance
programme.desc: Known for its unique and artistic approach to fragrance creation. Aiming to evoke emotions and memories through its carefully crafted perfumes, perfect for those who crave creativity in scent.

programme.title: Splendido Gold with Federico
programme.desc: Always crafted in Italy, Splendido Gold arrives in style with timeless elegance. Exquisite 14k gold jewellery for everyday or special occasions. Affordable luxury that makes a statement.

programme.title: Flipo Smart Solutions
programme.desc: From the most elegant flameless candles and home decor pieces to the coolest novelties and toys. Flipo presents the ultimate gift range, so grab a gift for someone, then another for yourself!

programme.title: Matahina Pearls
programme.desc: Luxury awaits! Hand-chosen pearls sourced globally. Discover brilliance, elegance and timeless style. Matahina Pearls - your investment in forever.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Nick and Yvette Wynne take on the gruelling journey of riding around Australia on their matching 1200 Ducati motorbikes. Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as these two motorcycle missionaries traverse 20 000 km in 3 months over 12 episodes.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: This show wouldn't be complete without some eats on the street, so grab a seat and take a sneak peek at some sweet treats and tasty meats from West to East.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: Jessie and Joe spend Thanksgiving with Maggie's family.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Ironically, in this era of Social Media, people are feeling more isolated and disconnected than ever. Groups like the team at 'Be That' are looking to change this, encouraging Australians to connect face to face and begin real conversations. 'Be That' has assembled a crew of Clinical Psychologists to develop relevant resources to encourage people to gather together and connect through intentional and empowering conversations. The Be That TV Show, created in partnership with ACCTV, shares the real stories of individuals, couples and families who have journeyed through bondage to freedom and inspire others that they too can overcome challenges. Topics are discussed with host Jo Bouris, and regular panellist, Clinical Psychologist, Sarah Harriott. Guests are welcomed to the couch, who speak hope, life and encouragement through their personal experience. Viewers can then access the topic resources and corresponding questions to start their own journey to understanding and healing: 'Be that' person they were designed to be.

programme.title: To All a Good Night
programme.desc: Ceci, a photographer for the local newspaper, is grieving her father's recent passing, which left her and her mother-in-law in charge of the family estate. Her father was known for hosting a beloved Christmas party where townspeople decorated trees on the estate grounds, with the proceeds from tree sales going to charity. One day, Ceci rescues a motorcyclist named Sam after an accident, only to suspect that he is only there to buy their land. As unexpected events unfold, Ceci and Sam find themselves reviving her father's cherished tradition.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: You're Bacon Me Crazy is a deliciously charming love story about Cleo, a passionate young chef with a popular food truck. With the help of her niece Tessa, Cleo's handcrafted Italian sandwiches have become a favourite of the bustling and competitive Portland food scene. But when Gabe, the handsome chef of a rival food truck called the Bacon Wagon, parks across the street, Cleo's goal to win a local food truck competition takes a spicy turn. With Gabe's help and her family's encouragement, Cleo comes to learn that she's not going to win if she doesn't push herself. As she comes to realise that owning her own restaurant is what she wants most, she also begins to understand that her food isn't the only thing that could use some TLC. The only way Cleo can have everything she wants is if she adds the most important ingredient to both her cooking and her life. And that's love.

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: The familiar and the futuristic interact with ancient people, places and events to create a sense of wonder, anticipation, empowerment, and personal breakthrough as the children witness God's interaction with man. Superbook is always an exciting journey, full of discovery - with a transformational outcome. Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend. Play fun Superbook games here: https://us-en.superbook.cbn.com/games.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Christmas 1 Piercing the Darkness: If the Roots are Deep, the Shoot Will Grow
programme.desc: Since 1970 the Hour of Power has been reaching viewers from around the world. Originally founded by Dr Robert H Schuller, the program became the most-watched religious program in the world, reaching 17 million viewers. Now under the leadership of Bobby Schuller, Dr Schuller's grandson. The congregation worships at Shepherd's Grove Church in Garden Grove, CA. The program aims to provide spiritual principles and practices that can help people, as they become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning. To learn more about who they are in Christ through the process of formation, to belong to his family of believers and become a part of the community and to heal as they are loved and then love and help heal others through mission. Jesus Christ ushered in the Kingdom of God into our world through His death and resurrection. He invites everyone to be a part of this amazing movement by trusting and following Him. There is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA; join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Give Me an Answer exists to answer life's most difficult questions. The shows are recorded on college campus across the United States where Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: A Merry Scottish Christmas
programme.desc: In 'A Merry Scottish Christmas', estranged siblings Lindsay and Brad played by Lacey Chabert and Scott Wolf, travel to Scotland at Christmas to reunite with their mother Jo, a big family secret is revealed. The picturesque setting, complete with a magnificent castle and festive traditions, serves as the perfect backdrop for rediscovering family bonds and the magic of Christmas. As they navigate old family tensions and new romantic sparks, the siblings find that the true spirit of Christmas lies in forgiveness, love, and the joy of being together. This heartwarming tale of reconciliation and holiday cheer will leave viewers with a newfound appreciation for the enchantment of a Scottish Christmas.

programme.title: The Christmas Train
programme.desc: Taking a transcontinental trip to Los Angeles from Washington DC by train and deciding to chronicle his adventure, disillusioned journalist Tom Langdon finds himself westbound with a variety of characters. All provide inspiration for a story he wants to write in honour of his late father. He begins a journey of rude awakenings, thrilling adventures, and holiday magic as his fellow passengers open his eyes to wondrous possibilities, and the opportunity for love he thought had been forever lost.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Why the Nativity? Interview with Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join Dr. David Jeremiah and Sheila Walsh on the set of Why the Nativity? as they discuss various aspects of the birth of Christ.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Christmas in My Heart
programme.desc: When concert violinist Beth travels home from New York for Christmas after her mother's passing, she rediscovers the joy of her small hometown. While organising a kids' end of year recital in honour of her late mother, Beth begins tutoring aspiring violinist Katie, a student at the school and daughter of local country star Sean Grant, who left music after his wife's death. As Beth teaches Katie, she and Sean clash over their different approaches to music, but Sean is eventually won over by the way Beth is able to connect with his daughter. As the three experience the joy of the season together, Beth inspires Sean to start writing music again, and Sean motivates Beth to try out for the local orchestra. When Beth gets the spot, she grapples with the idea of moving back home for good. But as she deepens her connection with Sean and Katie while reconnecting with her community, it becomes clear where she belongs.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Be of good cheer, for Jesus is with you. Psalm 102 (Houston 1981).

programme.title: Soul Surfer
programme.desc: Soul Surfer is the inspiring true story of teen surfer Bethany Hamilton. Bethany lost her left arm in a shark attack and courageously overcame all odds to become a champion again, through her sheer determination and unwavering faith. Bethany (AnnaSophia Robb) was born to surf. A natural talent who took to the waves at a young age, she was leading an idyllic life on Kauai, participating in national surf competitions with her best friend Alana (Lorraine Nicholson), when everything changed. On Halloween morning, a 14-foot tiger shark came out of nowhere and seemed to shatter all her dreams. Soul Surfer reveals Bethany's fight to recover from her ordeal and how she grappled with the question of her future. Strengthened by the love of her parents, Tom (Dennis Quaid) and Cheri (Helen Hunt), and supported by her youth group leader Sara (Carrie Underwood), Bethany refuses to give in or give up, and begins a bold return to the water.

programme.title: Written in Chalk
programme.desc: In the year 2000, when the new millennium was celebrated with Sydney's famous New Year's Eve fireworks, the word 'Eternity' glowed brilliantly across the Harbour Bridge. It's a word that was seen for 35 years written on Sydney's streets in chalk by a man named Arthur Stace. In this documentary Written in Chalk: The Echo of Arthur Stace, discover the legend of the man who became 'Mr Eternity' and how that word ended up in lights.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has been meeting the needs of the community since 1990. With a vision for a church that is REAL, RELATABLE, ENJOYABLE, LIFE-CHANGING & UPLIFTING, they are committed to providing church services that will enable you to experience church this way. Linked by mutual vision and values, which are based firmly in the Bible and what the Bible teaches, GGC's mandate is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a relatable and practical way..

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: An inspirational program with principles for living, and life stories from everyday New Zealanders. Collated with a fresh and dynamic edge, Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles both from the platform, and on location. Impact for Life equips people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Experience the wonder of Christmas like never before with a front-row seat to the Nativity story and take an unforgettable journey through the very first Christmas.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: The In Touch program reaches the world with the Gospel with messages that tackle such issues as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships. Dr. Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching. Dr Charles Stanley is the author of more than 50 books.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: News of a New King Part 1
programme.desc: The news of Jesus' coming sent shockwaves into the world. Joseph and Mary's lives were changed forever. It was such a momentous event that wise men from the east traveled hundreds of miles to see this new King. In part 1 of News of a New King, Pastor Bayless takes you back to that earth-shaking event, sharing how it changed lives then and how it still changes lives today. Listen and find out how the news that shook the world then is still making waves today!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham and his wife, Deb, 20 years ago. They believed that the power of God was evident in their growing church and that His Gospel message should be spread beyond the walls of that church to the world at large. They put their faith into action and purchased airtime on the Trinity Broadcasting Network. PowerPoint Ministries was then officially launched in April 1994. Over the past 19 years, PowerPoint Ministries has grown to an expansive network of local, national, and international television and radio broadcasts. In fact, PowerPoint can be seen or heard by a potential audience of millions of television viewers and radio listeners across the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Iran, Russia, Israel and more. The Ministry has a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living using the most effective means to impact the world, making an eternal difference in this generation.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA; join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations. Reaching across denominational walls, her ministry is used to spread the fires of revival and ignite a fresh passion in the hearts of believers to go deeper in their relationship with God. Katherine carries a strong prophetic and miracle anointing with many experiencing instant healing in her meetings.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry. Hear inspiration for change, healing, peace and joy through his affective communication connecting you to God, the church, and the world!

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Jealousy, envy, and greed can lead to significant issues in your life! Today, Joyce discusses some of the "minor" sins and what the Bible has to say about sin in general.

programme.title: The Hiding Place
programme.desc: World War II. Darkness has fallen over Europe, and the boots of the Third Reich echo through the streets. But on a quiet city corner in the Netherlands, some choose to resist. Corrie Ten Boom and her family risk everything to hide Jewish refugees by the hundreds, and they ultimately face the consequences when they are discovered. The Hiding Place is their story - a story of faith, hope, love, and forgiveness in the face of unthinkable evil. This powerful presentation was adapted for the stage by AS Peterson, directed for the stage by Matt Logan, and filmed in Nashville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Should We Cancel Christmas?
programme.desc: Every year, Christmas gets busier and busier. It's stressful and many people struggle emotionally. In a society that seems to have lost the Christian heritage of Christmas, maybe its time to ask if we should cancel it altogether? In light of this, host Karl Faase, looks at three aspects of Christmas in this intriguing program. The answers are surprising - revealing strong economic, historical and personal reasons why Christmas should continue to be an important part of our Australian community.

programme.title: A Merry Scottish Christmas
programme.desc: In 'A Merry Scottish Christmas', estranged siblings Lindsay and Brad played by Lacey Chabert and Scott Wolf, travel to Scotland at Christmas to reunite with their mother Jo, a big family secret is revealed. The picturesque setting, complete with a magnificent castle and festive traditions, serves as the perfect backdrop for rediscovering family bonds and the magic of Christmas. As they navigate old family tensions and new romantic sparks, the siblings find that the true spirit of Christmas lies in forgiveness, love, and the joy of being together. This heartwarming tale of reconciliation and holiday cheer will leave viewers with a newfound appreciation for the enchantment of a Scottish Christmas.

programme.title: The Chosen: The Shepherd
programme.desc: Simon, a disabled shepherd, struggles to keep pace with his counterparts, yet he diligently seeks to understand the ancient prophecies about the promised Messiah who will bring healing and hope to his people. Simon's weakness makes him a pariah among his fellow Israelites, especially the leader of the synagogue who is disgusted by his imperfection. Simon seems doomed to a life of pain and struggle as an outsider until a miraculous revelation allows him to be part of the greatest moment in history. The Shepherd tells the story of the first Christmas through the eyes of a shepherd whose life of suffering and rejection changes when he and his fellow shepherds receive a miraculous revelation.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Impacters Community - The Hope of the World Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Bruce and his team will move, inspire and challenge you to live your life to the absolute fullest. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Bruce travels Australia speaking regularly about his experiences in life and in the Church in a way that is both relatable and easy to understand. Bruce's message of power, impact, freedom and purpose is for anyone and everyone - for no matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Merry Christmas?
programme.desc: For many, Christmas is a time of excitement and joy as loving families share in the festive traditions of the season. But for others, the Christmas holidays are only a reminder of what is missing in life. Merry Christmas? tells the stories of three such people. Sherry was abused as a child and sank into a life of prostitution, crime, and drug use. For her, Christmas was always the time when she hit rock bottom. As a young girl, Mirasel was orphaned after a natural disaster struck her native Philippines. She spent years without the love and support of a family. Vinny, an aspiring rock musician was on the road to fame and fortune until his wife died tragically and he was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, events that shattered him and derailed his hopes and dreams. Yet, through the struggles and pain these three individuals have found the grace to cope with their losses and move ahead in faith. Pastor Mark Jeske of the Time of Grace television program hosts this Christmas special and brings perspective to these stories as he unveils how the Christmas story speaks to hurting people.

programme.title: Why the Nativity?
programme.desc: Every year, millions of people around the globe celebrate Christmas. But what does it all mean? Do we really understand the profound importance and authenticity of the birth of Jesus? Why the virgin Mary? Why a carpenter named Joseph? Why poor shepherds and wealthy kings clamouring to worship a Newborn King? And why are the Old Testament prophecies that predicted the birth of Jesus in Bethlehem so important to the Christmas story? Drawing from both the Old and New Testaments, noted pastor, author, and theologian Dr. David Jeremiah provides answers to some of the most thought-provoking questions surrounding the most pivotal moment in human history-the birth of Jesus Christ. Travel back in time and experience the sights and sounds of that first Christmas. You'll have a front- row seat to the nativity story as you witness the Old Testament prophets foretelling the birth of Jesus, Gabriel appearing to Mary, Joseph and Mary traveling the road to the crowded city of Bethlehem, angels appearing to shepherds, the brilliant star guiding the Wisemen from the East, and on to Bethlehem where we discover the humble stable where we find Baby Jesus lying in a manger. Why the Nativity? is a fascinating presentation of biblical history with stunning visual dramatics creating an unforgettable journey through the wonders of Christmas! Make watching Why the Nativity? a new holiday tradition!

programme.title: A Wise Man
programme.desc: A Wise Man? takes a modern look at the events of the first Christmas through the eyes of the wise men.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Christmas 2 Piercing the Darkness: The Words that Break and the Words that Make

In part 1 of News of a New King, Pastor Bayless takes you back to that earth-shaking event, sharing how it changed lives then and how it still changes lives today. Listen and find out how the news that shook the world then is still making waves today!

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: As Christians, we sometimes find ourselves overlooking certain issues like jealousy, envy, or greed. Find out what the Bible has to say about those issues and more.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Why the Nativity?

Travel back in time and experience the sights and sounds of that first Christmas. You'll have a front- row seat to the nativity story as you witness the Old Testament prophets foretelling the birth of Jesus, Gabriel appearing to Mary, Joseph and Mary traveling the road to the crowded city of Bethlehem, angels appearing to shepherds, the brilliant star guiding the Wisemen from the East, and on to Bethlehem where we discover the humble stable where we find Baby Jesus lying in a manger. Why the Nativity? is a fascinating presentation of biblical history with stunning visual dramatics creating an unforgettable journey through the wonders of Christmas! Make watching Why the Nativity? a new holiday tradition!

programme.title: Israel - A Walk in the Word
programme.desc: A Walk in the Word takes us on a 10 day journey through the beautiful land of Israel. Jump on board with tour guide and host, Shirley Carpenter who leads us to the places that Jesus grew up, was baptised, taught, chose His disciples and lived. At each location Shirley brings context to the teachings and events of the bible, and in turn gives a challenging insight to the Word of God and its relevance in today's world. This documentary was filmed in late 2016 over a 12 day period, incorporating more than 30 different locations throughout Israel, on a bus tour with people from across the world. It is an inspiring and revealing look at some of the most loved stories from the bible with a backdrop that brings them alive, both physically and spiritually. Shirley brings her unique knowledge of scripture and the Holy Land together in what becomes an exciting and challenging 'Walk in the Word'.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Praise, Prayer & Preaching is recorded live at Wesley Mission, Sydney, Australia. Rev. Keith Garner, an inspiring and gifted teacher who not only wants to influence the world, but to change the world, encourages and challenges us every week to live out our faith in a practical way.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: Inspired by actual events, Fly Away Home tells the heartwarming story of a single father, Thomas Alden (Jeff Daniels), who is reunited with his daughter, Amy (Anna Paquin), after a nine-year separation. Grieving over the loss of her mother, thirteen-year-old Amy finds solace in a nest of abandoned goose eggs she discovers on her the farm. When Amy nurtures the orphaned goslings to maturity, Thomas realises that he and his daughter must teach them how to fly, if the geese are to survive and migrate south for the winter. Along the way, the airborne adventurers overcome a series of obstacles to get the geese to their winter home. And Amy and Thomas find the relationship they thought they'd never know.

programme.title: Harriet Tubman: They Called Her Moses
programme.desc: Harriet Tubman is a familiar and revered name in American history. But many are unfamiliar with the details of her remarkable story, the depth of her character, and the inner motivations that drove her. Born into slavery in Maryland in the 1820s, Harriet Tubman's resolute Christian faith would compel her to extraordinary acts of courage and sacrifice. Through her selfless efforts, hundreds of African-American slaves escaped to freedom. Tubman's tenacious trust in God and love for others earned her the title 'the Moses of her people'. Discover the real Harriet Tubman in this compelling documentary narrated by Alfrelynn Roberts and featuring expert interviews with leading scholars, including Dr Eric Lewis Williams of the Smithsonian Institute and Carl Westmoreland of the National Underground Railroad Freedom Center. It also features remarkable early 20th century audio recordings of African-American spirituals sung by former slaves.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Blessed with Father Abraham's Blessings pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is an animated action-adventure series about a young spy with a whole lot to learn! He's arrogant and reckless and always insists on working alone. That is, until the day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum! Deb Defrates is not a spy. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow always seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham and his wife, Deb, 20 years ago. They believed that the power of God was evident in their growing church and that His Gospel message should be spread beyond the walls of that church to the world at large. The Ministry has a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living using the most effective means to impact the world, making an eternal difference in this generation.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Through stories from a chef, a basket weaver and a Grammy Award winning drummer we glean a better understanding of the myriad of ways that Gullah traditions and practices impact contemporary arts and culture in the low country of Charleston. At a beloved Charleston haunt Craig and Earl discuss the deep African roots of Gullah culture with the three black professionals and a local restaurateur.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth hopes for the best when Tom Thornton visits with an exciting opportunity for the town's choir. Rosemary and Bill interview a source. Lucas considers his options.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: LIFE, a multi-campus church with locations in Auckland, New Zealand and Melbourne, Australia. Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Everytown Downunder
programme.desc: Everytown Downunder is the mission trip of a lifetime! Travelling through the Aussie outback to coastal towns and Australia's biggest cities, Everytown Downunder has everything you'd expect from a trip around Australia - the outback, crocodiles, unique Aussie characters, Sydney Harbour and more. The series follows Australia's most travelled music evangelist, Steve Grace and his 28 person team on a 25,000km road trip performing 78 evangelical concerts, sharing their faith journeys and experiencing everything Australia has to offer. Along the way, they camp under the outback stars, swim with crocodiles at the top end, learn how to make an Aussie meat pie, and fulfil many life long dreams.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: New Wine and Old Wineskins - Part 1
programme.desc: One of the biggest challenges Christians face is to live a holy life without becoming overly rigid and judgmental with their faith. Today, Joyce discusses the difference between the old covenant law and new covenant grace.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA; join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Veggie Tales: The Star of Christmas
programme.desc: This action-packed adventure teaches that it's the true story of God's love that shows us how to love one another - at Christmas time and throughout the year!

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: With war raging about her and soldiers closing in, the wounded missionary Gladys Aylward sets out on the most difficult journey of her life - a 100-mile trek over the mountains to a safe haven. But it's not her own safety that concerns this little woman with big faith. It's the safety and well being of the 100 orphaned children in her care. Watch as Gladys' strength and faith are stretched to the limit, all for the sake of the children.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.sub-title: Adam and Eve, Noah, Abraham and Sarah
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Impacters Community - The Hope of the World Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Bruce and his team will move, inspire and challenge you to live your life to the absolute fullest. Bruce travels Australia speaking regularly about his experiences in life and in the Church in a way that is both relatable and easy to understand. Bruce's message of power, impact, freedom and purpose is for anyone and everyone - for no matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Robert Brzeski's Story _ A Love Worth Dying For
programme.desc: Gary Kent is the speaker for The Incredible Journey. He is an archaeologist who has excavated numerous sites throughout Israel and Jordan. He holds a BA in Theology, MA in Ancient History & Archaeology, and M in Divinity. As an internationally-acclaimed speaker and TV presenter, he has spoken and produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places and natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Matchup
programme.desc: The show that brings together talented home bakers alongside the cast of "When Calls the Heart" to face off in a Christmas cookie baking challenge.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Matchup
programme.desc: The show that brings together talented home bakers alongside the cast of "When Calls the Heart" to face off in a Christmas cookie baking challenge.

programme.title: USS Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas so Maddie, a reporter for a Norfolk newspaper, agrees to go on a 'Tiger Cruise' with her mother, invited by her sister, Amelia, a Lieutenant in the Navy. The three receive a dinner invitation from the ship's captain who invites his own son to join them for dinner and reminisce about Christmas's past when the ships Captain used to work alongside Maddie and Amelia's father who is now deceased. As the Captain discusses the very first Tiger Cruise, Maddie is inspired to write about a long forgotten romance of a couple who first met on that voyage. Captain Jenkins assigns his good looking fighter pilot son Billy to assist Maddie in researching her story by accessing the ships archives.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Set Free to Follow God Pt26
programme.desc: The stories told in the book of Exodus are among the most foundational in the whole of the Bible. God's rescue of his people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation and these events are continually reinterpreted to make sense of God's actions. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing an oppressed group of people, but to bring them into a life-giving relationship that is part of his biggest plan to renew the whole world.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Blessed With Father Abraham's Blessings Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: New Wine and Old Wineskins - Part 1
programme.desc: One of the biggest challenges Christians face is to live a holy life without becoming overly rigid and judgmental with their faith. Today, Joyce discusses the difference between the old covenant law and new covenant grace.

programme.title: USS Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas so Maddie, a reporter for a Norfolk newspaper, agrees to go on a 'Tiger Cruise' with her mother, invited by her sister, Amelia, a Lieutenant in the Navy. The three receive a dinner invitation from the ship's captain who invites his own son to join them for dinner and reminisce about Christmas's past when the ships Captain used to work alongside Maddie and Amelia's father who is now deceased. As the Captain discusses the very first Tiger Cruise, Maddie is inspired to write about a long forgotten romance of a couple who first met on that voyage. Captain Jenkins assigns his good looking fighter pilot son Billy to assist Maddie in researching her story by accessing the ships archives.

programme.title: The Ride: A Christmas Eve Parable
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in the suburbs of Chicago and a bored, disengaged taxi driver reluctantly accepts one more pickup. The customer asks to be taken to a local bridge and the cabbie soon begins to suspect that his passenger is planning to commit suicide. In an uncharacteristic attempt to help, the cab-driver makes excuses to prolong the ride while he attempts to connect with and help his distraught fare. As the night progresses, grace invades the hearts of both the complacent and the desolate. Directed by Dallas Jenkins (What If) and winner of the TAFF 2013 Best Film Award, The Ride has brought church audiences to their feet and impacted thousands.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a peaceful, grown-up evening of dinner and conversation a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours. What could go wrong? An endearing true-to-life family comedy that celebrates the beautiful mess called parenting.

programme.title: North to Home
programme.desc: When life takes a turn, sisters take your hand. Follows Suzanne McBride and her three adopted daughters. This looks like a great time for a family reunion, but the sisters are each wrestling with unique challenges that threaten to derail this special occasion.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Be of good cheer, for Jesus is with you. Psalm 102 (Houston 1981).

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has been meeting the needs of the community since 1990. With a vision for a church that is REAL, RELATABLE, ENJOYABLE, LIFE-CHANGING & UPLIFTING, they are committed to providing church services that will enable you to experience church this way. Linked by mutual vision and values, which are based firmly in the Bible and what the Bible teaches, GGC's mandate is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a relatable and practical way..

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Blessed With Father Abraham's Blessings Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry. Hear inspiration for change, healing, peace and joy through his affective communication connecting you to God, the church, and the world!

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: 'The Christian View' is a fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrives anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way down a road of desires and intentional acts that bring us to our destination. We program our internal GPS to guide us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading? For seventeen years, host, Mitch Kruse was owner, CEO, and auctioneer for Kruse International, the world's largest collector car sales organisation. Today, Mitch writes and speaks to a wide array of audiences and on The Restoration Road offers sound biblical teaching exploring wisdom, leadership and restoration. Is there anything in your life that needs restoration? Like a classic car that needs restoration, each one of us must surrender our old wreck of a life to the Restorer who desires to return us to His original design.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: I.S.S.
programme.desc: Tensions flare in the near future aboard the International Space Station as a conflict breaks out on Earth. Reeling, the US and Russian astronauts receive orders from the ground - take control of the station by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: He's a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrate the life and music of an icon who inspired generations through his message of love, peace, and unity. In this powerful and uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's incredible story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that changed the world.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: The Great Escaper
programme.desc: Bernard Jordan, a World War II veteran, sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family from Downunder to the States, searching for a brighter future after his successful music company collapses. With nothing more than their seven children, suitcases, and their love of music, David and his pregnant wife Helen set out to rebuild their lives. David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: Night Swim
programme.desc: Former baseball player Ray Waller moves into a new home with his family. But a dark secret in the home's past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family into the depths of terror.

programme.title: The Exorcist: Believer
programme.desc: When a 12-year-old girl becomes possessed by a mysterious demonic entity, her father desperately searches for help.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: To live in Barbie Land is to be a perfect being in a perfect place. Unless you have a full-on existential crisis. Or you're a Ken.

programme.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The highly-anticipated sequel catches up with best friends Diane, Vivian, Sharon and Carol as they take their book club to Italy for the trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: Freud invites iconic author C.S. Lewis to debate the existence of God, his unique relationship with his daughter, and Lewis' unconventional relationship with his best friend's mother.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible – Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family from Downunder to the States, searching for a brighter future after his successful music company collapses. With nothing more than their seven children, suitcases, and their love of music, David and his pregnant wife Helen set out to rebuild their lives. David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Maybe I Do
programme.desc: Michelle and Allen are in a relationship and decide to invite their parents to finally meet. Turns out, the parents already know one another well, which leads to some differing opinions about marriage.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's initial attraction quickly turns sour until they must pretend to be a couple.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called "The Plastics". However, when Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend, she finds herself in Regina's crosshairs. She must learn to stay true to herself while navigating the most cut throat jungle of all: high school.

programme.title: The Origin of Evil
programme.desc: In France, a woman gets sucked into a world of secrets and betrayal as the battle over her estranged father's massive estate reveals he is more than a genial patriarch.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: This film is based on the true story of a government leak from former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner. Saturday afternoon, June 2017, twenty-five-year old Reality Winner is confronted at her home by the FBI. A cryptic conversation begins and soon Reality's life starts to unravel.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Jeanne
programme.desc: Jeanne is headed to Lisbon to put her mother's apartment for sale. At the airport, she bumps into Jean, a whimsical former high school friend.

programme.title: Rock Hudson: All The Heaven Allowed
programme.desc: The biography of renowned actor Rock Hudson is examined in this relevant investigation of Hollywood and LGBTQ+ identity, from his public 'ladies' man' character to his private life as a gay man.

programme.title: The Color Purple (2023)
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband simply called Mister. With the support of sultry singer Shug Avery and stand-her-ground stepdaughter Sofia, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: Maddie finds an enticing job ad: parents looking for someone to "date" their awkward son.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Aristotle and Dante
programme.desc: Mexican teenagers Aristotle Mendoza and Dante Quintana explore their friendship while struggling with racial and ethnic identity, sexuality and family relationships in 1987, Texas.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Set during the tense 19 days of the Yom Kippur War in 1973. Israeli Prime Minister Golda Meir is faced with the potential of Israel's complete destruction, and must navigate overwhelming odds, a skeptical cabinet, and a complex relationship with US Secretary of State Henry Kissinger. Her tough leadership and compassion would ultimately decide the fate of her nation and leave her with a controversial legacy around the world.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: 80 for Brady
